title: Akalynth Council Member Reputation (local ops) v1
description: Operator council member registry entry. Source of truth for vote weight resolution in council DAO v2.

member_id.description: Stable council member slug (operator handle or agent id).

reputation_score.description: Vote weight used by council-execution-gate when --members-dir is set.

status.description: Suspended members cannot cast weighted votes through the gate.
